title: Write ferrum_extlib_charconv.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_charconv: comprehensive character encoding conversion to/from UTF-8 at system boundaries. Ferrum stdlib has latin1, ascii, utf16 but not legacy encodings (shift_jis, gbk, big5, windows-125x, iso-8859-*) inline. Design the extlib module covering: encoding detection, ICU-backed conversion, streaming transcoding, all IANA charsets, error handling policy.
